title: Assistant Store Manager - DMart - Work From Home Available

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - DMart - Work From Home Available
jsonLd.description:
DMart invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Assistant Store Manager at our Patna location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About DMart:
DMart is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with DMart!
